mano_cua.result_summary: dev页面(index-dev.js) isMobile硬编码为true且toggle被注释掉，无法通过浏览器窗口缩放触发isMobile断点切换。需要动态breakpoint监听功能但dev页面未配置。同air-datepicker-613根因：dev页面功能受限。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: index-dev.js has isMobile: true hardcoded and the toggle is commented out. Cannot test dynamic isMobile breakpoint switching.
